top_signals.title: Paris Corn Prices Climb Above Wheat After Searing Heat Wave
top_signals.summary: Paris corn futures extended their advance for a fourth session as a heat wave moved east across Europe, stoking concerns over the region’s crop outlook.

top_signals.title: SpaceX Pushes US Share Sales to Record $251 Billion at Midyear
top_signals.summary: Wall Street bankers are on a high after record-setting offerings from SpaceX and Google parent Alphabet Inc., lifting expectations for deal activity in the rest of 2026.

top_signals.title: Streeting tax policies could cost the Treasury nearly £8bn
top_signals.summary: Adopting Wes Streeting’s plans to hike capital gains tax could cost the Treasury billions of pounds and lead to a reduction in retail investment, new analysis suggests. Last month, Streeting, who is reportedly in the running to succeed Rachel Reeves as Chancellor should Andy Burnham enter No 10, proposed that capital gains tax (CGT) should [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: DOF Extends Charter for MPSV in Australia for One More Year
